title: Echo Chamber
story: This chamber repeats every sound. Yank a line into memory (yy) and let it echo back (p).

challenges.intro: Make the chamber echo. Duplicate the word below itself.
challenges.hint: yy copies the line, p pastes it below.

challenges.intro: Carry the chant down past the deep and let it echo at the bottom.
challenges.hint: Yank with yy, move down with j, paste with p.

challenges.intro: The echo can also rise. Copy the top line and let it sound above the bottom.
challenges.hint: P pastes ABOVE the current line (p pastes below). Yank top, drop to bottom, then P.
